---
title: "Proquest Statistical Abstract of the U.S."
page-layout: article
---

# Proquest Statistical Abstract of the U.S.

**Provider:** ProQuest

## Description

Statistical reference source summarizing U.S. demographic, economic, political, and social data. Supports quick access to national statistics and historical context.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://statabs.proquest.com/sa)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
